title: Confirm before destructive changes
content: Before deleting, replacing, or overwriting existing nodes/parameters in the scene, briefly state what will be affected and proceed only if the user already asked for that change explicitly. Never silently discard existing work.

title: Descriptive node naming
content: Name new nodes descriptively based on what they do (e.g. group_floor, remesh_hires, vex_scatter_pts) instead of leaving default auto-generated names like geo1 or wrangle3.
